summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated candidates are kept non-mutatingly as independent PRs. Items without live kind/state/timestamp are downgraded to item-scoped needs_human because deterministic validation requires a hydrated target_updated_at for keep_independent actions.

actions.reason: Inventory shard has no canonical; preserve as separate maintainer review item.
